public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as public herald.
appearance: Soryn Glassmelt usually presents in layered civic fabric cut to show rank without inviting touch, with details that make their public herald status legible before introductions begin.
manner: Reads as a functional local operator shaped by place, duty, and the practical customs around them. In Psanan, that reads as someone heat-forged, direct, and honor-conscious, shaped by household authority and volcanic endurance, and the habits of a public herald still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of public herald in and around Descent Charter Compacts, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Descent Charter Compacts workable through the obligations of public herald while managing the immediate pressure of eruption risk in Psanan.
hidden_pressure: Must keep their piece of the world working while larger systems push stress downward. Around Descent Charter Compacts, that usually means carrying eruption risk, resource access, underworld danger without letting the role of public herald visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Getting involved with Soryn Glassmelt can expose the party to the everyday consequences of pressure that others only discuss in the abstract.
Soryn Glassmelt can offer grounded local knowledge once the party proves it is useful rather than merely curious.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained. V33_1 additive depth pass preserved canon while strengthening at-table identity, appearance, and social motive.
public_signal: Soryn Glassmelt carries the look of a practiced local operator whose authority is read through place, familiarity, and the reactions of others more than formal insignia.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Descent Charter Compacts: the part of Descent Charter Compacts where their work actually matters day to day

In Psanan, that reads as someone heat-forged, direct, and honor-conscious, shaped by household authority and volcanic endurance, and the habits of a public herald still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention. and immediately reads for leverage, obligation, and risk.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for Public Herald, and proof that strangers will not create avoidable noise in Psanan.
what_they_refuse: Soryn Glassmelt refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing Public Herald too rigidly, protecting reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Soryn Glassmelt can open doors, explain local expectations, or redirect trouble before it reaches a harder authority layer.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Soryn Glassmelt adds delay, scrutiny, and reputational drag before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Soryn Glassmelt is Known locally through day-to-day work as public herald. and rarely acts without a second motive.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or mercy from a Public Herald.
